title: How to Watch Giro d’Italia 2026 in the USA, Canada, and Worldwide
content:
Here's how to watch Giro d'Italia 2026 from May 8-31 as Jonas Vingegaard hunts his first pink jersey. Who in the deep GC field can stop him?

Read the full article at How to Watch Giro d’Italia 2026 in the USA, Canada, and Worldwide on Velo.
author: Jim Cotton
